_meta.description: Regulatory fine schedules used for blast radius calculation. Update periodically.

GDPR.notes: Tier 1 for less severe violations; Tier 2 (higher of €20M or 4% global annual turnover) for core principles violations. GDPR Art. 83.

DPDP.notes: Up to ₹250 Crore for significant breaches. DPDP Act Section 33.

RBI_PA.notes: Up to ₹5 Crore per incident. Non-compliance can lead to PA license revocation.

PCI_DSS.full_name: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard
PCI_DSS.regulator: PCI Security Standards Council / Card Brands
PCI_DSS.notes: Card brands (Visa/Mastercard) fine acquiring banks $5K–$100K/month per merchant. Merchant can lose card acceptance rights.

DORA.notes: Higher of €10M or 2% global annual turnover. DORA Art. 50.

NIS2.notes: Essential entities: higher of €10M or 2% global turnover. Important entities: €7M or 1.4%.

SEC_CYBER.notes: Civil penalties up to $5M for willful violations. Material incident disclosure required within 4 business days.

SEBI_CSCRF.full_name: SEBI Cybersecurity and Cyber Resilience Framework
SEBI_CSCRF.regulator: Securities and Exchange Board of India
SEBI_CSCRF.notes: Up to ₹25 Crore per violation. Applies to Market Infrastructure Institutions (MIIs) and REs.

HIPAA.full_name: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act
HIPAA.notes: Tiered: $100–$50,000 per violation, max $1.9M per category per year.

ISO_27001.notes: No direct regulatory fines but loss of certification leads to contract losses. Estimated average business impact.
